Render a ggplot2 object on a text_plot widget

Source: R/widgets-plot.R
plot_ggplot.Rd

Extracts data and geom layers from a ggplot2 object and renders them as terminal charts using plotext. Supports common geom types: geom_point, geom_line, geom_col/geom_bar, geom_histogram, geom_boxplot, and geom_smooth.

Usage

plot_ggplot(app, id, gg, color = NULL, clear = TRUE)

Arguments

app

An RtuiApp object.

id

Widget id of a text_plot.

gg

A ggplot2 object.

color

Optional default colour override.

clear

Whether to clear existing plot data first (default TRUE).

Value

Invisible app.
